title: Skill-sync runtime-block renderer + frozen regression net
action: Per D9-refined + slice-3 reshape decisions: build the runtime-block renderer in the REAL sync path — applySyncSkill (onboard_bee.mjs:1162-1243) reached via self-onboard mode sync (NOT self_skip; the claim at skills/bee-hive/SKILL.md:31 is stale — fix that doc line in this cell). (1) MARKER GRAMMAR (strict): exact full-line markers <!-- bee:only claude --> / <!-- bee:only codex --> / <!-- bee:end -->; refuse loudly with ZERO writes for the WHOLE apply (not per skill): nesting, unclosed blocks, stray bee:end, unknown runtime labels, markers before/inside YAML frontmatter, markers inside fenced code blocks (forbid, do not parse), ambiguous near-markers. Whole-tree validation runs BEFORE any mutation. (2) FILTER: claude blocks survive only into claude-class targets (repo-claude, global, legacy-global), codex blocks only into repo-agents; marker lines always stripped; unmarked content shared. Zero-marker files: byte-preserving passthrough (BOM, CRLF, final-newline state, arbitrary bytes) — with no markers anywhere, rendered output is byte-identical to source (asserted). (3) INTEGRITY CONTRACTS (three, distinct): release/package hashing stays canonical-source bytes incl. markers; per-target drift compares installed files against render(canonicalBytes, targetRuntime) at BOTH sites — computeSkillItems (:693) and the applySyncSkill fast-skip (:1233-1236); downgrade preflight stays version-based (untouched). (4) PROVENANCE: rendered targets carry render-schema/target metadata (extend the existing per-target version marker mechanism); source-identity.mjs (templates/lib + .bee/bin mirror) classifies a rendered projection and REFUSES it as an onboarding source for ANY target — own runtime included — with a loud blocked_no_source-style reason and zero mutations; canonical or plugin source is required, no exceptions, no target-filter semantics. (5) TESTS + WIRING: scripts/test_skill_render.mjs (grammar refusals, filter per target-class, byte-preservation, idempotent re-render, no-marker no-op invariant, provenance refusal incl. the own-runtime case); add test_skill_render.mjs AND the existing scripts/test_state_write_concurrency.mjs to commands.verify in .bee/config.json and to the mandatory-suite guard in scripts/test_verify_manifest.mjs; update test_onboard_bee.mjs expectations only where the render model legitimately changes them (each documented in the report); regenerate the release manifest if tracked files changed. No skill content is tagged in this cell.

truths: with no markers present anywhere, every managed-root sync output is byte-identical to source including BOM/CRLF/final-newline (asserted)
whole-tree validation refuses all malformed-marker classes loudly with zero writes for the entire apply
both hash sites compare rendered bytes per target; release hashing stays canonical; downgrade stays version-based
a rendered projection is refused as an onboarding source for ANY target, own runtime included (provenance, tested)
test_skill_render + test_state_write_concurrency wired into commands.verify and the mandatory-suite guard
stale self_skip claim at bee-hive/SKILL.md:31 corrected
key_links: renderer lives inside applySyncSkill + computeSkillItems, the path self-onboard and host onboarding share
prohibitions: No skill SKILL.md content tagging in this cell (except the one stale self_skip doc line)
No new file layout (no adapters/, no dist/)
No change to the version-based downgrade preflight
No silent expectation changes — each documented in the report

verify: bash -c 'env -u BEE_AGENT_NAME bash -c "node scripts/test_skill_render.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_plugin_distribution.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/test_verify_manifest.mjs && node scripts/test_config_validate.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check" && echo RENDER-OK'

trace.outcome: D9 skill-sync runtime renderer + provenance + frozen regression net. Strict full-line marker grammar with whole-tree pre-validation refusing the entire apply (blocked_render, zero writes) on nesting/unclosed/stray-end/unknown-label/frontmatter/fenced/ambiguous; per-runtime render(bytes,runtime) filter wired into computeSkillItems drift (:693) and applySyncSkill fast-skip+write (both hash sites), byte-identical zero-marker passthrough. Release hashing canonical, downgrade preflight untouched. Provenance: rendered targets stamped .bee-render.json; source-identity (template + .bee/bin mirror) classifies rendered_projection and readSourceReleaseIdentity refuses it as a source for ANY target incl own runtime (blocked_no_source, zero mutations). Wired test_skill_render + test_state_write_concurrency into commands.verify and the mandatory-suite guard. Fixed stale self_skip claim at SKILL.md:31. No skill content tagged.
deviations: 1. Provenance mechanism = dedicated `.bee-render.json` sidecar at each rendered
target's skills ROOT, rather than literally extending the state.mjs per-target
version marker. Reason: mutating state.mjs per target would break the D9
byte-identity invariant (state.mjs is a synced skill file). The sidecar is a
sibling of the bee-* dirs (never inside one), deterministic (no timestamp so
re-applies stay idempotent), classified by source-identity as
`rendered_projection` and refused as an onboarding source for ANY target. This
satisfies the must_have precisely while preserving byte-identity. In-cell
design choice, not architectural.
2. New refusal status `blocked_render` for malformed-marker grammar (distinct
from `blocked_no_source`, which the cell specified for the provenance case).
Flows through the existing skillSync.blocked abort → zero mutations, exit 1 on
apply, reporting exit 0 in plan mode. No status enum exists to collide with
(verified: no test asserts a closed status set).
3. test_onboard_bee.mjs was reserved and inspected but required ZERO expectation
changes: with no markers in any real skill file, render() is byte-identical, so
every existing byte-identity/idempotency assertion holds unchanged; the sidecar
is a dot-file that trips no target-root assertion (the only closed-entry check
filters to `isDirectory() && startsWith("bee-")`). The cell's "update
expectations only where the render model legitimately changes them" clause
permits zero changes — none were legitimate here.
4. test_state_write_concurrency.mjs (cell-mandated wiring into commands.verify):
its timing-sensitive "sweep-heartbeat race" subtest flaked once under machine
load during the first full-chain run, then passed 5/5 standalone and green in
the full-chain re-run. Pre-existing test property; no claim/heartbeat code was
touched by this cell. Recorded as friction, not a regression.
trace.friction: test_state_write_concurrency.mjs has a timing-sensitive sweep-heartbeat race subtest that flakes under load (passed 5/5 standalone, green in full-chain re-run); now mandatory per cell mandate — future stabilization may be wanted.
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "red_failure_evidence": "BEFORE this cell three behaviors did not exist. (1) The sync path copied raw source bytes verbatim — applySyncSkill wrote fs.readFileSync(source) directly and computeSkillItems fingerprinted raw source; there was NO marker grammar and NO render refusal, so a malformed marker was undetectable and would sync through as ordinary content. AFTER: a malformed marker refuses the whole apply with status blocked_render and zero writes (test_skill_render 'gate: malformed marker refuses the whole apply with zero writes' asserts blocked_render on both plan and apply). (2) source-identity had no rendered_projection kind and readSourceReleaseIdentity ACCEPTED a project_projection/legacy_global copy as a runtime-only onboarding source (onboard_bee.mjs old branch ~:405-418). AFTER: a skills root carrying .bee-render.json classifies as rendered_projection and is REFUSED (blocked_no_source, zero mutations) — proven by 'provenance: onboarding FROM a rendered projection is refused for any target'. (3) The full config.commands.verify chain was recorded GREEN before the first edit (frozen regression net, PIPE_EXIT=0) and GREEN after (PIPE_EXIT=0), proving render() is byte-identity on the untagged real tree — the change alters behavior only where markers/provenance are introduced, nowhere else.",
  "tests_inspected": [
    "skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs — sync/drift/idempotency/byte-identity + legacy-global refresh; byte-identity & closed-entry assertions unaffected (0 failures, 1 pre-existing skip)",
    "skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_plugin_distribution.mjs — plugin inventory/cachebuster pins; unaffected",
    "scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs — source-identity template == .bee/bin mirror; kept in lockstep this commit"
  ],
  "tests_added_or_changed": [
    "ADDED scripts/test_skill_render.mjs (27 cases): grammar refusals, per-runtime filter, idempotent re-render, byte-preserving passthrough, no-marker no-op, provenance refusal + end-to-end onboarding-from-a-rendered-projection (own-runtime), whole-tree gate zero-write on plan and apply",
    "CHANGED scripts/test_verify_manifest.mjs — MANDATORY_SUITES gains test_skill_render + test_state_write_concurrency",
    "UNCHANGED (documented) skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs — no legitimate expectation change (render byte-identical on marker-free tree; sidecar is a dot-file no assertion trips)"
  ],
  "verification_run": "Per-cell verify chain green (RENDER-OK): test_skill_render 27/27, test_onboard_bee 0 failures/1 skip, test_plugin_distribution pass, test_lib_mirror pass, test_verify_manifest all mandatory suites, test_config_validate 39/39, release_manifest --check 146 files match. Full config.commands.verify chain re-run end-to-end green (PIPE_EXIT=0), BEE_AGENT_NAME unset."
}
